New Giza project, is a New city Urban development near Sheikh Zayed City.
• Location : Gizah, Egypt.
• Scope Site : Neighbourhood 04 Westridge, RB011 Prototypes (The Rock Residence).
• Year : 2019 - 2020 
• Phase : Construction Documentation / coordination / As-Built 
• Description: This coordination model is one of 3 prototypes focuses on the integration of architectural, structural, and MEP systems

Roles:
• Model Upgrading, and coordination up to LOD 400, shop-drawing,nd documentation, quantity take-offs, Clash detection and resolution.
• Coordinating with as-built conditions and apply it  to the model complying with all desciplines Architecture, Structure, and MEP with site changes.
• Managing Client Modifications and create Model prototypes that comply with every Building units and its modified finishing materials and architectural layout.
• developing automation workflows for data management, reporting, and modelling using Dynamo and grasshopper scripting.
Rendered Images and Model credits: New Giza Developments, ECG Consultants, and Redcon Construction Co. S.A.E

The Aquellum project is a futuristic, subterranean (upside-down skyscraper) carved into a 450-meter-high mountain range along the Gulf of Aqaba in Saudi Arabia. Part of the massive NEOM development.
• The project have 2 parts Visitors arrive at the world's first (floating marina) and take a specially designed boat through a concealed underground canal into the mountain (The Cube)
• Location : Tabuk, Saudi Arabia
• Year : 2023 - 2025
• Phase : Design Development

Roles:
• BIM Modeling.
• Assisting with design tasks.
• Architectural drawings production.
• Space program and material take-off.
• Building automation scripts for geometry and COBie data implementation.
Rendered Images and Model credits: LAVA Berlin Studio, and NEOM

REWE IT Campus Porz is the central technology and software development headquarters for REWE digital, It serves as a modern workspace focusing on software development.
• Location : Köln, Deutschland
• Scope : Demolishing of 2 old buildings to design a new IT Mixed use public workspace project.
• Year : 2024 - 2026
• Phase : Design Development.
• Description: Coordinating and documenting as-built demolished parts and design the new HUB connecting with existing buildings.

Roles:
• As-built buildings coordination and modeling, including using preliminary laser scan point cloud data.
•  Setting up and defining project coordinates.
• BIM Modeling - Architectural drawings production.
• Maintenance of project's BIM models , coordinates, geometry, spaces and data changes between design, technical, and existing or to be demolished buildings.
• Architectural Drawings production.
Rendered Images and Model credits: LAVA Berlin Studio, REWE Group

Contained community blending residential luxury with commercial and cultural facilities in a modern village-like atmosphere.

Description:
• Dynamo Script for automated cullout of Revit model elements based on Room styles parameter values.
• Create callout views based on selected Rooms by a certain room parameter.
• Set the callout view boundaries to match rooms boundaries.
• Assign certain view template to the generated callout views, that helped also with project browser views organizing.
• In this case i have an assigned room parameter called room style (that defines room material finish types).
• Combine multiple rooms with no separation walls to create a single callout view.
• Give the generated callout views a unique custom naming.

Description:
• Revit Add-in | Live Model Dashboard.
• the Idea was to make a data-visualization add-in for Revit—exporting model data to JSON/Excel and maybe visualizing it in Power BI.
• What about a web-based dashboard living inside Revit?
• functions in WIP prototype:
• Filter elements by Category, Level, Worksets, and parameters with (AND / OR rules) ,it's simple but very useful filter.
• Feed selected parameter data into a Tree Map as ( Group / Stack / Value numeric value parameter ).
• Visualize percentages, select elements, and color the model based on the dashboard.

Description:
• Analyzes and visualizes floor slopes by painting floor element faces
• Allows user input to select floors and define minimum and maximum slope values (%)
• Displays selected floor count and visualized slope results according to the displayed legend.
• Includes Analyze and Reset Paint actions.
• Features a WPF-based UI for a clean and responsive user experience.
• The Addin should be compatible with Revit versions from 2020 to 2025
• A single Setup File is created to target Revit versions 2020-2025 using inno setup.

Description:
• Micro To Macro Seminar project at TU Berlin.
• Our team explored the integration of BIM and data analysis and its impact on building design, modeling, construction, and the supply chain.
• Our team designed and modeled a timber residential building, combining mass timber and modular components.
• Using the Carbo Life Calculator, 3DBI and Power BI, we created an interactive dashboard that seamlessly connects building geometry with various types of information.
• This allowed us to gain insights into key performance indicators such as embodied carbon, global warming potential, and cost.
• The live, iterative process helped us make informed decisions about each component design and material selection.
The Micro to Macro seminar project focusing on sustainable timber construction.
Adaptive reuse strategy for the Legré-Mante industrial site in Marseille.
Berlin Masterplan exploring urban flow and infrastructural integration.

Computational logic diagrams and node-based visual scripting.
